title: Gauntlet — Coding-Agent Evaluation Harness
pitch: A CLI + dashboard that runs AI coding agents against sandboxed task suites and scores them across multiple axes.
description: Open-source harness that runs AI coding agents against versioned tasks in Docker sandboxes and tracks scores across model versions.

title: Fleetline — Device Telemetry Platform
pitch: Real-time monitoring for a simulated fleet of 500+ devices streaming telemetry over gRPC, with a live control dashboard.
description: Real-time device fleet telemetry over gRPC into a Go ingestion service and TimescaleDB, with a live dashboard and two-way control.
